glm_parsed.knot_quote: For n=1, f1 = 0.b2 b3 b4 ..._2? No, in the example, f1 = 0.b1 b2 b3 ..._2, f2 = 0.b2 b3 b4 ..._2, so f_n = 0.b_{n+1} b_{n+2} b_{n+3} ..._2 for n>=1? For n=1, f1 = 0.b2 b3 b4 ..._2, but in the example, f1 = 0.b1 b2 b3 ..._2, so unless b1 is not the first digit, but it is.
